picks.title: US bombing of Iran expands as American troops killed and Tehran retaliates against the Gulf states
picks.summary: The US-Iran war widened into a ninth night of strikes, with Trump saying the latest bombing was 'in honour' of US troops killed in Iran's attack on a base in Jordan (16 US service members have now died). Iran's Revolutionary Guard hit US targets in Jordan and Kuwait, Israel signaled it is ready to resume combat against Iran, and Brent crude pushed back above $90 — with analysts warning the confrontation risks spinning out of control.
flags: Active, escalating war; casualty and target claims from both sides are contested

picks.title: Andy Burnham is set to become the new UK prime minister
picks.summary: Andy Burnham, the Greater Manchester mayor long seen as a Labour outsider, is set to become the UK's next prime minister — the seventh person to hold the office since 2016, underscoring an extended run of British political churn.

picks.bucket: US as the world sees it
picks.title: Infantino tries to usher Trump away as Spain lift the World Cup
picks.summary: As Spain lifted the World Cup after beating Argentina 1-0 in extra time — becoming the first nation to hold both the men's and women's world titles — cameras caught FIFA president Gianni Infantino trying to usher Trump, who had inserted himself into the trophy presentation, away from the celebrating champions. The awkward moment, watched worldwide, became a talking point about Trump's presence at the final.

picks.title: भारत का युवा अंतरिक्ष में इतिहास रच रहा है: PM Modi (Skyroot Aerospace)
picks.origTitle: भारत का युवा अंतरिक्ष में इतिहास रच रहा है: PM Modi | Monsoon Session | Skyroot Aerospace
picks.summary: The state broadcaster carries PM Modi hailing India's youth for 'making history in space,' celebrating Skyroot Aerospace's successful private orbital rocket during the Monsoon Session — the celebratory, government-forward framing typical of DD News.
flags: State-media source — celebratory framing of a government-linked achievement

picks.title: नीट परीक्षा के रिज़ल्ट पर उठे सवाल के बीच एनटीए की चेतावनी; केजरीवाल बोले- 'धमकी मत दो'
picks.origTitle: नीट परीक्षा के रिज़ल्ट पर उठे सवाल के बीच एनटीए की चेतावनी, केजरीवाल बोले- 'धमकी मत दो'
picks.summary: After a paper leak forced a re-test, the results of India's NEET 2026 medical-entrance exam are again under serious challenge, putting the NTA and central government back under opposition fire. When the NTA issued a warning, Arvind Kejriwal shot back 'don't threaten,' escalating a politically charged dispute the independent outlet foregrounds.
flags: Contested exam integrity; framing differs from state coverage

picks.title: 危险阶段即将到来？美伊冲突"局面正在失控"
picks.origTitle: 危险阶段即将到来？美伊冲突"局面正在失控"
picks.summary: Chinese state media runs an analysis warning that a 'dangerous phase' is approaching as the US-Iran conflict 'spins out of control' — with the US striking Iran a ninth straight night and Israel poised to rejoin combat. The alarmed framing reflects Beijing's messaging that US escalation is destabilising the region.
flags: State media analysis; framing emphasises US responsibility

picks.title: Над Рязанской областью сбили украинский БПЛА
picks.origTitle: Над Рязанской областью сбили украинский БПЛА
picks.summary: The state agency reports a Ukrainian drone shot down over the Ryazan region — one of many brief air-defense-success dispatches that foreground interceptions while saying little about damage from the broader overnight drone campaign.
flags: Russian state-media framing centers interceptions, not damage

picks.title: Украинские дроны атаковали Подмосковье; в Подольске загорелась нефтебаза, в Домодедово — склад
picks.origTitle: Украинские дроны атаковали Подмосковье, есть пострадавшие. В Подольске загорелась нефтебаза, в Домодедово — склад
picks.summary: Meduza reports Ukrainian drones struck the Moscow region overnight — an oil depot caught fire in Podolsk and a warehouse in Domodedovo, with casualties. The mayor said 400+ drones flew toward the region, 85 downed near Moscow. The independent outlet details the damage the state coverage plays down.

picks.title: 関東甲信・東海が梅雨明け 東日本中心に危険な暑さ 熱中症対策を
picks.origTitle: 関東甲信 東海 梅雨明け 東日本中心に危険な暑さ 熱中症対策を
picks.summary: Japan's weather agency declared the end of the rainy season across the Kanto-Koshin and Tokai regions, with dangerous heat above 38°C forecast across eastern Japan, including central Tokyo. NHK urges people to use air conditioning and stay hydrated to prevent heatstroke.

picks.title: 帯状疱疹ワクチン、自己負担額は同じ県でも3倍差　金額どう決まる？
picks.origTitle: 帯状疱疹ワクチン、自己負担額は同じ県でも3倍差　金額どう決まる？
picks.summary: The independent daily investigates why out-of-pocket costs for the shingles vaccine can vary as much as threefold even within the same prefecture in Japan, unpacking how the price is set — a practical accountability angle on healthcare cost disparities.

picks.title: Trump's priorities could put a hefty portion of federal grants in Vermont on the chopping block under a proposed rule
picks.summary: A proposed federal rule tied to the Trump administration's priorities could cut a large share of federal grants flowing to Vermont. A government spokesperson framed it as ending grants 'politicized...to promote a far-left DEI agenda,' while Vermont recipients warn of significant local funding losses.
flags: Highly politicised framing in the administration's statement

picks.title: Amid the generation crisis, new obstacles emerge for completing the Power Expectations project
picks.origTitle: En plena crisis de generación: surgen nuevos escollos para la culminación del proyecto de Power Expectations
picks.summary: Amid Puerto Rico's ongoing power-generation crisis, new hurdles have surfaced for finishing the Power Expectations temporary-generation project: the company asked to change the composition of the consortium that signed the June contract, even though the deal requires the installation to be completed by November.

picks.title: India's first privately-developed rocket reaches orbit on dramatic debut launch
picks.summary: Skyroot Aerospace's Vikram-1 reached orbit on its debut flight — India's first privately-developed rocket to do so, a milestone for the country's fast-growing private space sector. 'On the first attempt, reaching orbit, I never thought it was possible,' a team member said.

picks.title: Show HN: I replaced a $120k bowling center system with $1,600 in ESP32s
picks.summary: A hacker recounts replacing a bowling center's $120,000 proprietary scoring/pinsetter control system with about $1,600 worth of ESP32 microcontrollers — a vivid example of cheap, capable hardware displacing expensive legacy industrial systems.

picks.title: 1-bit LLM running in the browser
picks.summary: A demo runs a 1-bit quantized language model entirely in the browser via WebGPU — pushing the frontier of extreme model compression and fully local, offline inference without any server.
